title: gladiolus graminifolius
intro: Gladiolus graminifolius, also known as the grass-leaved gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Gladiolus graminifolius can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
